text: @andysitian @Adele_lide Kwani kasongo removed his on money, Takataka wewe mtoto wa mchawi umbwa.
human_rationale: The tweet dehumanises the target with 'Takataka wewe... umbwa' (You are filth... dog) and layers coded insult with 'mtoto wa mchawi' (child of a witch), a culturally loaded Swahili slur used to delegitimise and shame.

text: RT @citizentvkenya: Rigathi Gachagua: I’m told they want to try and overturn the results and if they can’t, they cause chaos so that the election is cancelled so that they get another opportunity to repeat the elections. Even if they do, the results will remain the same. That is the Kikuyu nation for you
human_rationale: 'That is the Kikuyu nation for you' transfers blame for political chaos onto the entire ethnic community.
